target: Implement the operator visual token system and reusable component primitives for the tmux-host dashboard.
invariants: The UI must remain a derived supervisory surface, not a second source of truth.
Desktop and mobile must consume the same shared state model.
Neon accents are structural; state color and explicit text remain primary.

commit.message: Implement UI tokens and operator components

steps.task: Define the shared visual tokens for colors, spacing, and typography with a dark matte base and structural neon accents.
requirements: Use cyan, violet, and magenta as structural accents only.
State colors must remain explicit and outrank decorative accents.
Do not add glassmorphism or full-surface neon flood.

steps.task: Implement the core operator components for state chips, blocker panels, action buttons, pane cards, command panels, event feeds, and confirmation modals.
requirements: Every component must render explicit text state where relevant.
Keep components generic and operator-oriented rather than page-specific.

steps.task: Add narrow unit tests for token and component contracts, especially explicit state text and reusable component presence.
requirements: Do not start building full screens in this packet.
Keep tests focused on component and token contracts.
